_description: Tabulated EPref values (kWh/m2/yr electrical) for SI 5282 Part 1 (2024 amendment).
_source: Reverse-engineered from EVERGREEN v3.0.4 (EP 9.4) results on NILI Holon project, Zone B. Zones A and C: not yet calibrated — use reference-box simulation as fallback.
_notes: EPref = reference HVAC energy / COP / area, averaged over 4 orientations.
Small unit threshold: area <= 50 m2 uses higher EPref (more wall per m2).
Floor type 'top' applies to units with roof exposed to outdoors (may not coincide with highest floor number — e.g. 05X3 in Nili is 'top' due to exposed roof).
01X4 in Nili gets expert EPref=40.12 (vs standard 38.04) — likely due to unconditioned parking below. Use 38.04 as default for all middle-floor standard units.
